headline: Professor Dingle McSpangle Solves Math Problem, Forgets To Write It Down
summary: The solution is 'somewhere in the void' and 'probably beautiful.'
fullBody: Professor Dingle McSpangle, the absent-minded mathematician, reportedly solved the famed 'Equation of Everything' but immediately forgot to write it down. 'It was beautiful,' McSpangle recalled. 'It involved pie, I think.' Colleagues are devastated, but McSpangle remains optimistic. 'I'll probably solve it again next Thursday,' he said. 'Unless I forget.' The mathematics community has placed a whiteboard in his office with a note saying 'WRITE IT DOWN.'
